author: Alexandre Stanislawski
subject: v1.11.13
body: ## [1.11.13](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.11.12...v1.11.13) (2017-06-07) ### Bug Fixes * **url-sync:** reverting back to using `change` event (#2183) ([07f4be0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/07f4be0)), closes [#2173](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2173) [#2171](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2171)
